revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{#if:{{{div|}}}|}}{{#if:{{{td|}}}|}} {| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed" style="{{#if:{{yesno|{{{cont|{{{last|}}}}}}}}|margin-bottom:-.65em}}; {{{style|}}}; width:100%;" |- ! colspan="{{#if:{{{columns|}}}|{{{columns}}}|2}}" style="line-height:normal; padding:0.2em; {{{titlestyle|}}};" |
{{{1|Further information}}}
{{#if:{{{div|}}}|
}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{div|}}}|}}{{#if:{{{td|}}}|}} {| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed" style="{{#if:{{yesno|{{{cont|{{{last|}}}}}}}}|margin-bottom:-.65em}}; {{{style|}}}; width:100%;" |- ! colspan="{{#if:{{{columns|}}}|{{{columns}}}|2}}" style="line-height:normal; padding:0.2em; {{{titlestyle|}}};" |

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Collapsed_infobox_section_begin here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
